# Previous Notes ## Design * Revert all design and match Greekowl, when ready send live demo to client ## Copy - Home * \[x] Add more copy for Apartment choices * \[x] Features section, change bg picture * \[x] See the best icon to put on Apartment choices * \[x] Add 5 Reviews * \[x] Review section, remove bg picture *** # New Changes The meeting is taking place today * no grey, its not on the color pallet * photos in a proper row * nav menu - same color as buttons +darker 10-15% + submit form button * buttons grey as button * bcards qr code send *
